---
title: "Joseph Masters"
---

## Joseph Masters

**Dates:** (1795/6-1863)

### Description

publisher

### Biography

He published CMY’s early works including <i>Henrietta’s Wish</i> and <i>The Two Guardians</i>;  he was also the editor of <i>The Churchman's Companion</i>. [death reported in <i>John Bull</i>, 29 August 1863]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 14th 1897
- Letter from April 23d [1881]
- Letter from Novr 23d 1861
- Letter from April 22nd 1861
- Letter from March 15th 1860
- Letter from May 26th [1854]
- Letter from Jany 21st [1854]
- Letter from Decr 23d 1852

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
